summary: W-9 Management UI updates tested and verified. All requested changes are working correctly: 1) Download button removed from All Employees table W-9 column, 2) View button (eye icon) shows for employees with W-9, 3) Upload button shows for employees without W-9, 4) W-9 Viewer Modal sidebar shows Approve button (checkmark) next to Delete (trash) for non-approved W-9s, 5) Footer has pb-16 padding to avoid 'Made with Emergent' badge overlap, 6) Footer shows Approve button for non-approved W-9s, 7) Status shows 'On File' instead of 'Pending', 8) All 4 W-9 documents visible for Lisa Martinez, 9) Backend approve_specific_w9 API works correctly.

all_employees_w9_column_view_only.details: All Employees table shows only View button (eye icon) in W-9 column for employees with W-9. Download button correctly removed.

all_employees_upload_button.details: Upload button appears in W-9 column for employees without W-9 (e.g., Emily Davis)

w9_viewer_sidebar_approve_button.details: Approve button (green checkmark) appears next to Delete (red trash) icon in sidebar for non-approved W-9 documents

w9_viewer_sidebar_no_approve_for_approve.details: Approved W-9 documents show only Delete button in sidebar, no Approve button

w9_viewer_footer_pb16_padding.details: Footer has pb-16 class for extra bottom padding to avoid 'Made with Emergent' badge overlap

w9_viewer_footer_approve_button.details: Footer shows Approve button for non-approved W-9s, hidden for approved W-9s

w9_status_on_file_not_pending.details: W-9 status shows 'On File' (blue) for submitted docs instead of 'Pending'. Approved docs show 'Approved' (green)

all_w9s_visible_for_employee.details: All 4 W-9 documents are visible in sidebar for Lisa Martinez (7f7731bf-a24e-475f-8353-c1069a7c6fd8)

backend_approve_specific_w9_api.details: POST /api/admin/employees/{id}/w9/{doc_id}/approve endpoint works correctly, returns 200 with success message

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All W-9 management changes verified via Playwright)

test_credentials.admin_login: Enter code '4399' in email field on /login page to login as Matthew Guzman (admin)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - Lisa Martinez has 4 W-9 documents (3 approved, 1 submitted/On File)
context_for_next_testing_agent: W-9 management updates fully verified. Key changes: 1) All Employees table W-9 column shows only View button (eye icon), Download button removed, 2) Upload button appears for employees without W-9, 3) W-9 Viewer Modal sidebar has Approve (checkmark) next to Delete (trash) for non-approved W-9s, 4) Footer has extra padding (pb-16) to avoid badge overlap, 5) Footer shows Approve/Delete/Download buttons, 6) Status shows 'On File' for submitted W-9s, 'Approved' for approved ones, 7) Backend endpoint POST /api/admin/employees/{id}/w9/{doc_id}/approve tested and working.
